Velium War Wolf Choker  
 

Lore Item Quest Item
Slot: NECK
AC: 8
STR: +5 HP: +5
WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except DRU NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL except HUM ERU HEF DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

STR: +5 HP: +5

In order to do the Wristguard quest you do NOT have to get this item. You can just skip ahead to the acid step. No camping wolves endlessly and none of the corresponding faction hits.

__DEL__1591750303082
64 posts
The ones that are hilarious are the ones that list a class, but not a single one of the races can be that class! Now that is pretty funny : )
▲ Page top
RE: Race / Class
QuoteReply
# Jul 05 2001 at 12:45 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591752611466
Scholar
76 posts
Umm, not to burst anyone's bubble here, but Have you ever noticed how some of the items like the one we're posting on supplies, supposed, race class combos that don't make sense? Well, here's why. Instead of just programming each item with the ability for each race/class combo to use, they just insert specific criteria. For instance, on the above item, it is only wearable by races that can wear small armor. It is also not wearable only by the heavy caster classes.

WOW! What a concept! Verant is getting lazy; instead of programming an item by actually looking at what classes and races they're putting on it, they just punch in some basic criteria and fix it if there's a problem later. The programmers are up to their necks trying to fix the problems with the game that the users encounter as they encounter them. They also have to figure in game balancing issues, availability versus the level of players they want to be able to have that specific item, etc. So please, don't clutter up these forums with ignorant posts like, "I'd just love one of these for my Dark Elf Shaman," or "Hey, you have ranger listed, why not Half Elves?"

Thunderous Silenc
▲ Page top
